scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const pub=path.join(__dirname,'public');const zxingSrc=path.join(__dirname,'node_modules/@zxing/library/umd/index.min.js');if(fs.existsSync(zxingSrc)){fs.copyFileSync(zxingSrc,path.join(pub,'zxing.min.js'));console.log('✅ zxing.min.js 已复制到 public/');}else{console.log('⚠️  zxing 未找到');}const qrSrc=path.join(__dirname,'node_modules/qrcode/build/qrcode.min.js');if(fs.existsSync(qrSrc)){fs.copyFileSync(qrSrc,path.join(pub,'qrcode.min.js'));console.log('✅ qrcode.min.js 已复制到 public/');}else{console.log('⚠️  qrcode 未找到');}"
